content:
RORK — FINAL EXECUTION ORDER: COMPLETE + DEPLOY 28 MODULES NOW

OWNER DIRECTIVE:
No more narrative. No more audits. No more “code exists but not deployed.”
Finish the 28 incomplete modules end-to-end and deploy to production.

MISSION:
Complete, register, connect, test, push, deploy, and verify all remaining IVX modules.

REQUIRED MODULES:
1. Deals API
2. Casa Rosario API
3. Reels API
4. Reels → Deal Sync
5. Landing Analytics
6. Invest Now
7. Owner Dashboard
8. Admin Dashboard
9. Capital Network
10. Waitlist
11. Wallet
12. Settings
13. Partner CRM
14. Realtor CRM
15. Broker CRM
16. Notifications
17. Revenue
18. Push Notifications
19. Buyer CRM
20. Influencer CRM
21. Media Library
22. Transactions
23. Payments
24. Reports
25. Broadcast
26. Enterprise Orchestrator
27. Android/iOS/Web production surface
28. Roles & Permissions

EXECUTE:
- Build missing backend routes.
- Build missing Supabase tables if needed.
- Register all routes in backend/hono.ts.
- Connect frontend/mobile/admin screens.
- Remove all unexpected 404s.
- Public routes must return 200.
- Protected routes must return 401 without auth, 200 with owner auth.
- No fake data.
- No placeholders.
- No demo money/users/investors.
- Push to GitHub main.
- Trigger Render deploy.
- Verify production commit matches GitHub HEAD.
- Verify /health and /version.
- Test all 28 modules live.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
MODULES_COMPLETED:
MODULES_DEPLOYED:
FILES_CHANGED:
DATABASE_TABLES_CREATED:
ROUTES_REGISTERED:
ENDPOINT_RESULTS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when all 28 modules are live in production and GitHub SHA = Render SHA = /health SHA.

If blocked, return only the exact blocker and exact fix required.
